description: Non-Reddit discovery sources for Phase 2 token discovery layer

sources.label: The Block RSS
sources.why_included: Data-driven journalism on token launches, protocol upgrades, fundraising rounds.

sources.label: Bankless Newsletter RSS
sources.why_included: Deep DeFi/L2 analysis with fundamentals-heavy language; strong investment_quality signal.

sources.label: Messari News RSS
sources.why_included: Institutional analysis with TVL/revenue/tokenomics language — top fundamentals_hint source.

sources.label: Decrypt RSS
sources.why_included: Broad crypto news coverage, high token discovery breadth, reliable RSS.

sources.label: CoinDesk RSS
sources.why_included: Established credibility; token mentions here carry legitimacy signal.

sources.label: Cointelegraph RSS
sources.why_included: High-volume crypto news; good for cross-checking Reddit token mentions with press coverage.

sources.label: Token Terminal RSS
sources.why_included: Revenue-protocol analysis; token mentioned here = strong fundamentals signal.

sources.label: The Defiant RSS
sources.why_included: DeFi-focused journalism, strong narrative framing, augments Reddit DeFi signals.

sources.label: Electric Capital Dev Report
sources.why_included: Developer activity per ecosystem is the strongest fundamentals indicator available.

sources.label: Paradigm Research Blog
sources.why_included: Top crypto VC research; token mentioned here = strong investment_quality signal.

sources.label: a16z Crypto Posts
sources.why_included: Major VC portfolio/research coverage; fundamentals language is highly concentrated.

sources.label: DeFiLlama Raises
sources.why_included: Fundraising data = strong fundamentals signal. JS-rendered, will fail fetch gracefully.
